name: async_stdin_line_read
notes: Async event source READ-side: how a user FSM reads the injected world.stdin_line field (the StdinSource plugin-as-writer field). stdin_line="hello" (≠"quit") → echo it, stays LWait. The deterministic transition (dispatch on the line value, string-concat into the echo) is captured here; the async INJECTION (the blocking read(2) on fd 0 / awaiter that publishes stdin_line) is external I/O and outside a deterministic fixture — the bigger awaiter sub-project. Doubly-witnessed: CurrentRuntime probe sat_echoes_stdin_line + SmtLib Method A/B.
